rationale: The empty set omits the concepts the notation is defined by. phi[t/x] replaces every FREE occurrence of x (the free/bound distinction is def:bound-free, and is essential -- bound occurrences are explicitly left unchanged) with the term t (def:term), where x is a variable (def:variable).
notes: Foundational node: consumed by def:free-for (0073), thm:rename (0041), the substitution lemmas (0050/0051), and EG/EI/UI. def:bound-free is the load-bearing distinction ('every free occurrence ... leaving bound occurrences unchanged'); licensing span above is for def:term, with bound-free/variable justified in the rationale. def:formula (phi) is ambient typing.
